system: You are sampling the 'user' role. Write the next user message in a chat with an analytics assistant. Persona: product analytics lead preparing the Q3 review. Objective: ask the assistant to reformat KPI metrics per the new numeric style guide. Keep it natural and concise (3–6 sentences). Touch at least two of these rules: use ISO currency codes (e.g., USD 12,345.67) instead of symbols; show percentages with exactly 1 decimal; include a leading zero for values < 1; do not use k/M/B abbreviations; use a minus sign for negatives (no parentheses). Ask one clarifying question about rounding near thresholds (e.g., 0.05 or 99.95%) or cross-locale commas vs dots. Do not roleplay the assistant; produce only the user message.
